FROM stadium s
JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID

HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.Year) = 2;

final.final_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.Name, s.Location
FROM stadium s
JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID
WHERE c.Year IN ('2014', '2015')
GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID, s.Name, s.Location
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.Year) = 2;
final.answer_text: The only stadium that hosted concerts in both 2014 and 2015 is Somerset Park, located in Ayr United.
